# 03_Outputs — Generated Deliverables

**Do not edit files in this folder manually.**

Deliverables here are generated by `/ship` from the knowledge base in `02_Work/`. Every section traces back to verified insights.

## How to change outputs

1. Update the source of truth: add sources to `01_Sources/`, run `/analyze` and `/synthesis`.
2. Run `/ship` to regenerate deliverables with the updated knowledge base.

If you edit an output directly, your changes will be overwritten on the next `/ship` run.
